'''pathaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabip|rabip]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabip|rabip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pathaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthægæth|pæthægæth]] || [[word:pæthægæj|pæthægæj]] || [[word:pæthægæsh|pæthægæsh]] || [[word:pæthægæ|pæthægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathathagath|pathathagath]] || [[word:pathathagaj|pathathagaj]] || [[word:pathathagash|pathathagash]] || [[word:pathathaga|pathathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathagath|pathagath]] || [[word:pathagaj|pathagaj]] || [[word:pathagash|pathagash]] || [[word:pathaga|pathaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathafgath|pathafgath]] || [[word:pathafgaj|pathafgaj]] || [[word:pathafgash|pathafgash]] || [[word:pathafgaf|pathafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathagatha|pathagatha]] || [[word:pathagaja|pathagaja]] || [[word:pathagasha|pathagasha]] || [[word:pathagaka|pathagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathagath|pathagath]] || [[word:pathagaj|pathagaj]] || [[word:pathagash|pathagash]] || [[word:pathaga|pathaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathagathal|pathagathal]] || [[word:pathagajal|pathagajal]] || [[word:pathagashal|pathagashal]] || [[word:pathagakal|pathagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathagathatha|pathagathatha]] || [[word:pathagajaja|pathagajaja]] || [[word:pathagashasha|pathagashasha]] || [[word:pathagaka|pathagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathagathan|pathagathan]] || [[word:pathagajan|pathagajan]] || [[word:pathagashan|pathagashan]] || [[word:pathagakan|pathagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathagathaoro|pathagathaoro]] || [[word:pathagajaoro|pathagajaoro]] || [[word:pathagashaoro|pathagashaoro]] || [[word:pathagakaoro|pathagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
